## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The tool is actively maintained (updated within the last 12 months)
- [ ] The tool has a working website or repository
- [ ] Open-source tools have at least 100 GitHub stars
- [ ] The entry follows the correct table format
- [ ] I have not added duplicate entries
- [ ] Links are working and point to the correct destination
